items.caption: A digital illustration with a light blue background. on the left side, there is a hand with a white glove holding a syringe with a needle. the hand is in the process of throwing the needle into a white trash bin with a yellow biohazard sign on it. the text on the image reads "lorem ipsum" and "lorem ipsum," suggesting that it is a placeholder text commonly used in graphic design. the illustration is likely meant to convey the message of proper disposal of used medical equipment, specifically a hypodermic needle, in a designated hazardous waste bin.
